hypothesis: If Fe K-edge XAS spectra and local iron coordination environments from iron-containing proteins are curated via the proposed semi-automated digitization and annotation pipeline, then the resulting dataset will yield quantitatively faithful and reproducible spectra (low MSE to synthetic ground-truth and high inter-expert ICC) and enable machine-learning models to predict spectra from structure and coordination properties from spectra with nontrivial accuracy, because the pipeline preserves the deterministic mapping between local structure and XAS features.
